source: Cannot delete tag — {0} entries use it.
translation: Nije moguće obrisati oznaku — {0} unosa je koristi.

source: Do you want to sync all unsynced time entries to ERPNext now?
translation: Želite li sada sinkronizirati sve nesinkronizirane vremenske unose u ERPNext?

source: Entries older than {0} days are locked. Contact your administrator.
translation: Unosi stariji od {0} dana su zaključani. Obratite se administratoru.

source: ERPNext is not installed on this site.
translation: ERPNext nije instaliran na ovom mjestu.

source: ERPNext is reachable and Timesheet access is confirmed.
translation: ERPNext je dostupan i pristup vremenskim listama je potvrđen.

source: ERPNext Timesheet {0} for {1} is submitted — re-sync blocked.
translation: ERPNext vremenska lista {0} za {1} je predana — ponovna sinkronizacija blokirana.

source: ERPNext Timesheet is submitted — re-sync blocked
translation: ERPNext vremenska lista je predana — ponovna sinkronizacija blokirana

source: Download all your time entries as CSV.
translation: Preuzmite sve svoje vremenske unose kao CSV.

source: Warning: This entry is more than 7 days old.
translation: Upozorenje: Ovaj unos je stariji od 7 dana.
Novi unos (fokus na traku za brzo dodavanje)

source: Press H or Esc to close
translation: Pritisnite H ili Esc za zatvaranje

source: Work in focused sessions with timed breaks.
translation: Radite u fokusiranim sesijama s vremenskim pauzama.
